backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend, combining blob storage and authorization mixins to manage gemstones, reviews, cart, booking requests, contact submissions, gallery items, social media links, and user profiles with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: updating the Google Maps link in the Footer component and replacing placeholder images in the Vastu Advance Course section of the Services page.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short human-readable summaries describing the purpose and key content of each page and component in the React app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, muted, border, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'ASTROMANIA by Vijay Sawkar', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the app in ThemeProvider (dark mode) and React Query, and renders the shared Header/Footer layout with a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/FAQ.tsx: Accordion-based FAQ section component with five pre-defined questions and answers covering Kundali reading, Vastu correction, gemstone selection, gemstone effectiveness, and online consultations.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying brand info, social media icons, quick navigation links, services list, and contact details including a Google Maps search URL for Margao, South Goa that opens in a new tab.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop nav links, mobile menu toggle, and Internet Identity login/logout button using TanStack Router and React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for backend operations including gemstones, reviews, cart, bookings, contacts, gallery, and user profiles.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS defining a deep cosmic dark theme with oklch color variables, Tailwind imports, custom fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond, Inter), and utility animations like twinkle, float, and glow-pulse.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page showcasing astrologer Vijay Sawkar's biography, credentials, stats, and expertise areas with a cosmic-themed layout and imagery.
frontend/src/pages/BookConsultation.tsx: A consultation booking page with a form for selecting consultation type, mode, and personal details, which submits to the backend via a mutation hook and shows a success confirmation screen.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: A contact page with a message submission form, social/location info, and an admin-only gallery management section for uploading and deleting images/videos stored on the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: A media gallery page combining static certificate/photo assets with backend-uploaded items, supporting filtering by type, a lightbox viewer, and admin upload/delete controls.
frontend/src/pages/GemstoneShop.tsx: A gemstone shop page listing nine planetary gemstones with details, benefits, and weight options, allowing users to view item details and initiate a WhatsApp inquiry.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The landing page showcasing Vijay Sawkar's astrology services, stats, and testimonials with a hero section, service cards, and links to booking and other pages.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: React page listing astrology/vastu/numerology/gemstone services with details, pricing, and modes; includes file upload, mutation hooks, and Internet Identity integration.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Static React page displaying a grid of client testimonials with star ratings, service tags, and a styled dark cosmic theme.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond), a cosmic color palette, shadows, background gradients, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, known issues, and two existing feature requests: updating the Footer Google Maps link and replacing placeholder images in the Vastu Advance Course section of Services.tsx.
